sourceSummary.oneLine: Mechanical and Electronic Drawing report A-TCF-5-017 Rev.1 for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides schematic, Gerber, and mechanical drawing version information for the HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC detector.
keyPoints: Report No. A-TCF-5-017 is identified as Rev.1 with Rev. Date MAR/03/2020.
The document overview states it is the Mechanical and Electronic Drawing of the HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC.
Schematic and Gerber versions are listed for Main Board, ROIC Board, Gate Board, and Power Box Board.
Mechanical drawing versions are listed for detector frame components and power box covers.
